name: BLOCK PARTY
description: Cleared stage 1 — THE BLOCK.

name: EX-COP RETIRED
description: Beat BARON. He used to be a cop. Now he isn't.

name: BACK TO CORPORATE
description: Beat RAZOR. She walked home in heels.

name: PULLED THE PLUG
description: Beat VOLT. The blue lights went dark.

name: NOT FOR SALE
description: Hit all 5 prompts in the KANE QTE.

name: NICE
description: Land a 5-hit combo.

name: AWESOME
description: Land a 10-hit combo.

name: RIDICULOUS
description: Land a 20-hit combo. Marcus would be proud.

name: BLOCK LEGEND
description: 30+ hit combo. Tell the neighbors.

name: READ HIS EYES
description: Land your first PERFECT parry.

name: EYES ON THE WORK
description: Land 10 PERFECT parries in one run.

name: WORTH BROKEN HAND
description: PERFECT-parried BARON's haymaker.

name: UNTOUCHED
description: Cleared stage 1 without taking a hit.

name: STAND YOUR GROUND
description: Cleared a stage without using DODGE.

name: FISTS ONLY
description: Cleared a stage without using a SPECIAL.

name: FOR MARCUS
description: Finished the campaign as Rio.

name: BAD KNEE STILL WORKS
description: Finished the campaign as Duke.

name: TWENTY-FOUR NEXT WEEK
description: Finished the campaign as Atlas.

name: KANE'S WORST DAY
description: Finished the campaign on BRUTAL difficulty.

name: QUIET MAN
description: Faced BLACKWELL. He doesn't speak. Neither did you.

name: AGAIN, FROM THE TOP
description: Used STAGE SELECT to replay a cleared stage.

name: MIND THE CURB
description: Dodged the stage 1 taxi 3 times in one run.

name: OFF THE PLATFORM
description: Dodged the stage 2 train without taking damage.

name: BUSY NIGHT
description: Knocked out 100 enemies across all runs.

name: THE BLOCK PROTECTS THE BLOCK
description: Knocked out 500 enemies across all runs.

name: EVERY STREET
description: Cleared all 10 stages at least once.

name: THREE OF US
description: Beat the campaign with all three protagonists.

name: EYES BEHIND
description: Landed 3 back-attacks in one stage.

name: AIR MAIL
description: Launcher → jump → mid-air follow-up. Clean.

name: FULL METER
description: Fired a COUNTER-SPECIAL at 100% parry meter.
